AgentConfig.description: LLM and concurrency knobs for the verifier.

thinking.description: Enable provider extended-thinking / reasoning for verifier runs. `true` uses the provider's default; a string picks an explicit effort level; `false` disables.
thinking.title: Thinking
thinking.markdownDescription: Enable provider extended-thinking / reasoning for verifier runs. `true` uses the provider's default; a string picks an explicit effort level; `false` disables.

AgentConfig.title: AgentConfig
AgentConfig.markdownDescription: LLM and concurrency knobs for the verifier.

OutputConfig.description: Output defaults. Individual reporters are listed in `reporters`.
OutputConfig.title: OutputConfig
OutputConfig.markdownDescription: Output defaults. Individual reporters are listed in `reporters`.

ReporterConfig.description: One reporter instance. `output` is required for file-emitting reporters.
ReporterConfig.title: ReporterConfig
ReporterConfig.markdownDescription: One reporter instance. `output` is required for file-emitting reporters.

RequirementSelector.description: Filters applied on top of the requirements pulled from packs.

include.description: Requirement ids or glob patterns to keep.
include.title: Include
include.markdownDescription: Requirement ids or glob patterns to keep.

exclude.description: Requirement ids or glob patterns to drop.
exclude.title: Exclude
exclude.markdownDescription: Requirement ids or glob patterns to drop.

RequirementSelector.title: RequirementSelector
RequirementSelector.markdownDescription: Filters applied on top of the requirements pulled from packs.

ScopeConfig.description: Which files in the repo are eligible for analysis.

include.description: Glob patterns to include. Empty list means the whole repo.
include.title: Include
include.markdownDescription: Glob patterns to include. Empty list means the whole repo.

exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude (in addition to gitignore).
exclude.title: Exclude
exclude.markdownDescription: Glob patterns to exclude (in addition to gitignore).

ScopeConfig.title: ScopeConfig
ScopeConfig.markdownDescription: Which files in the repo are eligible for analysis.

Suppression.description:
A reviewed, time-bounded acceptance of a known finding.

Scope is set by either `path` (location-based, glob-aware) or
`fingerprint` (content-based, location-independent) — they are
mutually exclusive. With neither, the suppression applies repo-wide
to every finding raised by `requirement`.

path.description: Path or glob the suppression applies to. Omit for repo-wide.
path.title: Path
path.markdownDescription: Path or glob the suppression applies to. Omit for repo-wide.

fingerprint.description: Stable finding fingerprint, for code-location-independent suppression.
fingerprint.title: Fingerprint
fingerprint.markdownDescription: Stable finding fingerprint, for code-location-independent suppression.

reason.description: Human explanation; required so the rationale is auditable.
reason.title: Reason
reason.markdownDescription: Human explanation; required so the rationale is auditable.

expires.description: Date after which the suppression no longer applies.
expires.title: Expires
expires.markdownDescription: Date after which the suppression no longer applies.

Suppression.title: Suppression
Suppression.markdownDescription:
A reviewed, time-bounded acceptance of a known finding.

Scope is set by either `path` (location-based, glob-aware) or
`fingerprint` (content-based, location-independent) — they are
mutually exclusive. With neither, the suppression applies repo-wide
to every finding raised by `requirement`.

version.description: Config schema version. Bumped on breaking changes.
version.title: Version
version.markdownDescription: Config schema version. Bumped on breaking changes.

packs.description: Built-in pack identifiers or paths to custom pack files. Multiple packs are merged; conflicting requirement ids are an error.

anyOf.description: Path to a custom pack YAML file.
anyOf.markdownDescription: Path to a custom pack YAML file.

packs.title: Packs
packs.markdownDescription: Built-in pack identifiers or paths to custom pack files. Multiple packs are merged; conflicting requirement ids are an error.

context.description: Codebase context provided to the verifier as Markdown. Orients the verifier on architecture, tech stack, and scope so it spends fewer tokens re-discovering them from source.
examples: This is a Vue SPA with a FastAPI backend. Auth via Auth0, so password-hashing requirements don't apply.
context.title: Context
context.markdownDescription: Codebase context provided to the verifier as Markdown. Orients the verifier on architecture, tech stack, and scope so it spends fewer tokens re-discovering them from source.
